---
title: "Setting up attestations"
date: last-modified
---

Set up an attestation to capture model attributes at a specific point in time. This process involves configuring the attestation schedule, custom fields, and questionnaire for model owners.

Setting up attestation requires that you:

1. [Add an attestation](#add-attestations)
2. [Configure the attestation](#configure-attestations):
   - Add attestation periods
   - Add custom fields
   - Edit the questionnaire template
3. [Optional: Execute the attestation schedule to test](#execute-attestation-schedules)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A["Add an attestation"] --> B["Configure the attestation"]
    B --> C["Optional: Execute schedule"]
    
    B --- B1["Add attestation periods"]
    B --- B2["Add custom fields"]
    B --- B3["Edit questionnaire template"]
    
    click A "#add-attestations" "Go to Add attestations section"
    click B "#configure-attestations" "Go to Configure attestations section"
    click C "#execute-attestation-schedules" "Go to Execute attestation schedules section"
    click B1 "#add-attestation-periods" "Go to Add attestation periods section"
    click B2 "#add-attestation-fields" "Go to Add attestation fields section"
    click B3 "#edit-questionnaire-templates" "Go to Edit questionnaire templates section"
```

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to set up attestations.[^3]

:::

## Add attestations

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings** > **Attestations**.

2. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add New Attestation**.

3. Enter a name for the attestation.

4. Enter a description.

5. Click **Add Attestation**.

## Edit attestations

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to edit.

2. Click the {{< fa tripe-vertical-dots >}} and select **Edit**.

3. Make the changes and click **Save Period**.

## Remove attestations

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to remove.

2. Click the {{< fa tripe-vertical-dots >}} and select **Remove**.

3. Confirm the removal.

## Configure attestations

### Add attestation periods

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to configure.

2. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Attestation Period**.

3. Enter a name for the period.

4. Set the start date when attestations will be created.

5. Set the end date when attestations must be completed.

6. Click **Add Period**.

::: {.callout}
When the start date is reached, attestation instances will be automatically created for each model owner. They will receive a banner notification on their dashboard about pending attestations.
:::

### Add attestation fields

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to configure.

2. Click **Relevant Attestation Fields**.

3. Drag model inventory fields from **Model Inventory Fields** into **Relevant Attestation Fields**.

4. Optional: Reorder the fields as needed.

### Edit questionnaire templates

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to configure.

2. Click the template area to edit.

3. Make your edits, adding questions and checkboxes.

4. Click **Save**.

## Execute attestation schedules

For testing purposes, requires [**{{< fa code >}} Customer Admin**]{.bubble} role.

1. In the Settings > Attestations section, click the attestation you want to execute.

2. Click the {{< fa tripe-vertical-dots >}} and select **Execute Schedule**.

## What's next

- [Complete attestation questionnaires](/guide/attestation/complete-attestation-questionnaires.qmd)
- [Review attestations](/guide/attestation/review-attestation-questionnaires.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Working with model findings](/guide/model-validation/working-with-model-findings.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
